Package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions.api

package dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions.api
Provides the fundamental interfaces for conditional instruction execution.

This package defined the ICondition which acts as a predicate for the AbstractInstruction.

Condition Lifecycle When an instruction is fetched by the Executor, the shouldExecute method of the assigned condition is evaluated. If it returns true, the instruction logic is performed; otherwise, the instruction is treated as a NOP (No Operation).
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
TiJ
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    dk.tij.registermaschine.core.conditions
    Provides logical composition of conditions using Boolean algebra.
  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    ICondition
    Represents a boolean condition that can be evaluated within the context of the Registermaschine execution environment.
